title: Carpet-YBS-Addition
description: This is an expansion mod for Carpet that offers useful or useless features for YBS Server.
body:
# Carpet YBS Extension A Carpet Addition that provides useful or useless features for YBS Server.

这是一个基于Carpet模组的扩展，包含了诸多主要供月饼服使用的有用或者无用的功能。

[![madewithlove](https://img.shields.io/badge/made_with-%E2%9D%A4-red?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=orange )](https://github.com/YBS-Server/Carpet-YBS-Addition) # Added Rules You can find the list of all added rules on the [repo](https://github.com/YBS-Server/Carpet-YBS-Addition). # Links github:https://github.com/YBS-Server/Carpet-YBS-Addition
